scenes.title: Operations Dashboard
scenes.editIntent: Open on the daily command center that combines schedule, monitoring alerts, reporting deadlines, and compliance tasks.

blocks.text: This is the morning command center.
Visits, alerts, and compliance pressure are visible in one place.
It creates fast operational awareness.

scenes.title: Customer Profile
scenes.editIntent: Show a single customer record that unifies service history, monitoring status, compliance posture, reports, and files.

blocks.text: Each customer has one operational source of truth.
Service and monitoring context live together.
Compliance and reporting are attached to the same record.

scenes.title: New Customer Setup
scenes.editIntent: Capture onboarding flow for residential and commercial customers with equipment, plan assignment, and compliance flags.

blocks.text: Onboarding captures customer, equipment, and plan data quickly.
Residential and commercial paths are both supported.
Compliance flags are set up at creation time.

scenes.title: Service Visit Report
scenes.editIntent: Demonstrate structured visit entry so one technician workflow powers reports, compliance evidence, and historical records.

blocks.text: This is the highest-value operator screen.
Structured service data replaces ad hoc report writing.
Every visit contributes directly to compliance outputs.

scenes.title: Monitoring Center
scenes.editIntent: Present telemetry alert triage with risk context and action paths that feed service, reporting, and compliance workflows.

blocks.text: Monitoring events become actionable operations.
Alerts are filtered, assessed, and escalated from one workspace.
Follow-up actions are explicitly tracked.

scenes.title: Compliance Tracker
scenes.editIntent: Show requirement-level compliance tracking for EPA, UST, threshold checks, filings, and records retention.

blocks.text: Compliance is displayed as explicit requirements.
Warnings and alerts become concrete work items.
Evidence and export are inspection-ready.

scenes.title: Load Bank Decision Engine
scenes.editIntent: Visualize threshold-based load bank logic so testing is triggered by operational evidence rather than blanket scheduling.

blocks.text: Load bank actions are rule-driven.
Monthly threshold misses trigger a defensible recommendation.
The decision is logged into downstream reporting.

scenes.title: Monthly Report Generator
scenes.editIntent: Demonstrate monthly customer report assembly using selected sections and generated summary output.

blocks.text: Monthly reporting is generated from structured operations data.
Teams choose included sections per customer context.
Output can be generated, sent, and archived immediately.

scenes.title: Annual Compliance Report Builder
scenes.editIntent: Show annual commercial compliance packet generation with source-data checks, section assembly, and warning visibility.

blocks.text: Annual compliance reporting consolidates service and telemetry evidence.
Data source completeness is transparent before export.
Warnings are surfaced without blocking delivery.

scenes.title: Customer Portal
scenes.editIntent: Close on the customer-facing view with status transparency, recent events, and downloadable reports.

blocks.text: The customer sees clear readiness, not backend complexity.
Status, events, and documents are always accessible.
Transparency reinforces long-term retention.
